channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Shakira Adds Five New US Shows to “Las Mujeres Ya No Lloran World Tour”
item.description: Shake it with Shakira! 🌟 Just announced: 5 new US tour dates added! Who's ready to dance all night long? 💃🎶 #ShakiraTourAnnouncement

item.title: Bebe Rexha Celebrates Topping Two Dance Charts After Going Independent
item.description: 🎉 Bebe Rexha kicking butt and taking names on the dance charts! Independent queen 👑 #MusicMonday #BebeRexha #DanceMusic

item.title: Charli XCX, Lorde, Twenty One Pilots Lead 2026 Austin City Limits Fest
item.description: 🌟 Let's dance in Austin! Charli XCX, Lorde, Twenty One Pilots headline ACL Fest 2026 🎶 Who's ready? 🎉 #ACL2026

item.title: Dave Matthews Band & St. Vincent Cover Talking Heads At Riverbeat Music Festival
item.description: 🎶 Dave Matthews Band and St. Vincent bring the funk with a killer Talking Heads cover at Riverbeat Music Festival! 🙌 #MusicMagic

item.title: Jason Isbell Reuniting With Drive-By Truckers At Shoals Fest
item.description: 🎸 Get ready to rock as Jason Isbell joins Drive-By Truckers at Shoals Fest! A reunion you won't want to miss! 🎶 #MusicNews #ShoalsFest
